## Proposed topic

<!-- e.g. "Error boundaries in React: patterns from production" -->

## Which section does it belong in?

<!-- react / typescript / architecture / performance / testing / accessibility / state-management / frontend-system-design / case-studies / interview-prep -->
<!-- Or a NEW top-level topic, e.g. animations/, security/, build-tooling/ , see "Proposing a New Top-Level Topic" in CONTRIBUTING.md -->

## If this is a new top-level topic

- **Why does it deserve its own section** (rather than fitting an existing folder)?
- **3–5 example articles** that could live in it

## What problem does it address?

<!-- Why would a frontend engineer want to read this? -->

## Rough outline

<!-- A few bullet points covering what you plan to include. -->

## Are you planning to write it yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to write this
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting it for someone else to pick up
